title: NA HI ZO DIAM? TOPA’N HONG CI

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Na hi zo diam, Topa’n hong ci,
A mah tawh kikhai khawm ding

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hizo mah nung, Topa Nang aa hi
Hong bawlpha in Nang tawh kibangin
Lam nong hilhna vang tang ka muh uh ciang

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Na hizo diam, tua thu phawk ding,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Na kiimkot khua a mial ciang
A mah na kipiak theihna ding

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Na hizo diam, Topa’n hong sam,
